# Abel Gonzalez Art

I'm Abel Alejandro Gonzalez Pardo Vargas, a multidisciplinary artist blending 2D/3D animation, VFX, editing, sound design, and interactive media. With a background in both Fine Arts and Computer Science, my work explores themes of identity, memory, and digital culture. I create immersive visuals that range from experimental animation to game-inspired narratives, often reflecting on the impact of technology and social media. Whether through hand-drawn sequences, motion capture, or AI-generated content, I’m passionate about storytelling that challenges perception and connects with audiences on an emotional level.

## Sitemaps

- [XML Sitemap](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/sitemap.xml): Contains all public & indexable URLs for this website.

- [Hello world!](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/hello-world/) - Welcome to WordPress. This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start writing!

Concept and Narrative The Last Broadcast is a pixel art short film set in the year 2095, after global communication networks have collapsed. In a deserted landscape, a lone radio operator named Ava continues transmitting signals from an abandoned tower, unsure if anyone still listens. Each night she sends fragments of
- ["Between Blinks"](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/between-blinks/) - "Between Blinks" (VR Short Experience – 2025) Description:Between Blinks places the viewer inside the mind of a baby drifting between sleep and wakefulness. The sudden shift in environment places the mecha in a vast desert, where it begins an intense battle with Evangelion Unit-03. The piece blends stillness and explosive
- [Projects](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/projects/) - Projects Welcome to Abel Gonzalez Art In this page you will find content about all of my ongoing projects. "Heart and Mind: A Journey Through Dreams" "Fragmented Pulse" "Fractured Memories: Learning to Remember" "Silent Migrant" “Mannequin Variations: Studies in Control and Transformation” "Heart and Mind: A Journey Through Dreams" This pixel art game animation explores
- ["Silent Migrant"](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/silent-migrant/) - "Silent Migrant" Silent Migrant is an immersive VR installation that follows a wooden mannequin figure as it drifts through liminal spaces of migration—airports, customs lines, airplanes, and empty waiting rooms. The mannequin acts as a digital stand-in for the immigrant body, suspended between departure and arrival, memory and adaptation. Through body-tracking and motion-capture animation, the
- ["Heart and Mind: A Journey Through Dreams"](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/heart-and-mind-a-journey-through-dreams/) - "Heart and Mind: A Journey Through Dreams" This pixel art game animation explores the subconscious world of dreams through two core entities of the human body: the heart and the brain. Inspired by Undertale and Limbo, the project introduces players to a surreal, emotionally charged environment shaped by the inner state of a sleeping human.
- [“Mannequin Variations: Studies in Control and Transformation”](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/mannequin-variations-studies-in-control-and-transformation/) - “Mannequin Variations: Studies in Control and Transformation” A series of short animations exploring the wooden mannequin as a mutable body, sometimes obedient, sometimes resistant, sometimes transformed into the strange and sublime. Occam’s Razor: The Obedient Body A straightforward study where the 2D mannequin is moved by human hands, its joints bent with clarity and precision.

- ["Fragmented Pulse"](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/fragmented-pulse/) - "Fragmented Pulse" "Fragmented Pulse" Fragmented Pulse explores the fragmentation of identity in digital spaces through a series of 3D animated mannequins. Each mannequin performs different types of content, from dances and political statements to viral trends, reflecting the endless scroll of contemporary online life. Presented through an interactive platform inspired by TikTok, the project allows
- [Artistic CV](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/artistic-cv/) - Artistic CV Artist CVAbel Alejandro Gonzalez Pardo Vargas Email: abelgonzalezart@gmail.comWebsite: abelgonzalez.art Education 2025 (expected)BFA, AnimationFlorida International University, Miami, FL 2023AA, Computer Art AnimationMiami Dade College, Miami, FL Professional Experience 2024Private CommissionMiami, FL 2024Private CommissionMiami Dade College, Miami, FL 2023Private CommissionMiami Dade College, Miami, FL 2022Private CommissionMiami Dade College, Miami, FL 2022Private CommissionMiami Dade College, Miami,
- [“Fractured Memories: Learning to Remember”](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/fractured-memories-learning-to-remember/) - "Fractured Memories: Learning to Remember" Fractured Memories: AI, Nostalgia, and the Collapse of Memory is a video-based experimental project that dissects how memory is experienced, manipulated, and eventually fragmented through digital media. Using real photographs, AI tools, glitch aesthetics, and emotional soundscapes, the project transforms static images into moving recollections, alive, distorted, and deteriorating. Each
- [About](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/about/) - About Artist Statement Abel Alejandro Gonzalez Pardo Vargas is a multidisciplinary artist whose work explores identity as something fragmented, looped, and constantly shifting. Through experimental video, animation, photography, and digital art, he examines how emotion, memory, and presence are shaped by the digital world. He often works with mannequins, artificial environments, and motion based repetition
- [Contact](https://www.abelgonzalez.art/contact/) - Contact Abel Gonzalez abelgonzalezart@gmail.com
